title: CGM VITA (CompuGroup Medical) - European Healthcare IT
problem: European healthcare providers need integrated practice management, billing, and patient engagement solutions.
solution: European healthcare IT platform: EHR, practice management, billing, telematics infrastructure for German healthcare. Integration with statutory health insurance (GKV) systems.
technology: EHR, practice management, German telematics infrastructure
varden_fit: HIGH — CGM proves healthcare IT in Europe works. However, lacks advanced eligibility verification and prior auth automation.
notes: CONTRARIAN: European healthcare IT exists but lacks advanced eligibility and prior auth automation. This is the blue ocean.
